overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Ghost of Tsushima showing a samurai warrior riding a horse along a mountain trail. The character travels from rocky terrain with large white boulders past a wooden watchtower structure into open grasslands dotted with white flowers, with a persistent column of black smoke visible in the distant mountains throughout the journey.

scene_state.functional_zone: rocky mountain trail with large boulders

events.description: wooden watchtower structure comes into view on the left side of the path
horse rides past the wooden scaffolding watchtower

agents.ego_description: samurai riding horse along mountain trail at a steady trot through rocky terrain

entered.detail: massive white rock formation flanking the right side of the trail
thick black smoke rising vertically from a distant point in the mountains
tall wooden scaffolding structure with platforms and ladders
cluster of trees with bright yellow autumn-colored foliage
large gray rock formations on the hillside

segments.scene_description: The samurai rides along a dirt trail through rocky grassland under a clear blue sky. Large white boulders flank the path while a distant black smoke column rises on the horizon. The horse approaches and passes a wooden watchtower structure adorned with yellow banners.

scene_state.functional_zone: open grassland with white flowering plants

events.description: landscape opens into wide grassland with white flowers and distant forest visible

agents.ego_description: continuing along the winding path through open grassland with gentle turns

entered.detail: tall grass with white flowering plumes swaying in the wind
dense green forest covering the rolling hills in the distance
mountain peak visible on the horizon

segments.scene_description: Past the watchtower, the trail opens into expansive grasslands filled with white flowering plants. The path winds through rolling green hills toward a distant forest, while the black smoke column remains visible on the left horizon. The terrain becomes softer and more verdant as the horse continues along the winding dirt track.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement along a mountain trail that transforms from a rugged, rocky pass into an expansive, flowering grassland. It begins with a samurai riding through rocky terrain flanked by large white boulders under a clear blue sky, while a column of black smoke rises on the distant horizon. As the horse progresses, the camera passes a wooden watchtower adorned with yellow banners, marking a transition in the landscape. The scene then opens into rolling green hills filled with white flowering plants, with the dirt track winding toward a distant forest. Finally, the terrain becomes softer and more verdant as the rider continues forward, keeping the persistent black smoke visible on the left horizon.
